description_long: This is a large, commercial-style coffee machine with a robust rectangular body and two prominent group heads for brewing espresso. The front features two portafilters, each with its own handle, and a perforated metal drip tray spanning the width of the machine. On either side of the front panel, there are steam wands for frothing milk, and the top has a flat surface with metal rails, likely for cup storage. The back is plain and solid, while the sides are boxy and unadorned except for the protruding steam wands and handles. The machine stands on four short, sturdy feet, giving it stability and a slight elevation from the surface it rests on.
description: A large, commercial coffee machine with dual group heads, portafilters, steam wands, and a wide drip tray, designed for high-capacity espresso brewing. Its body is robust and metallic, with a flat top and sturdy feet.
description_view_0: Front view showing two group heads with portafilters, a wide drip tray, and two steam wands on either side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the machine and the protruding portafilter and steam wand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid back panel with no visible controls or features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other portafilter and steam wand, mirroring the left side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two circular controls or dials above each group head, symmetrically placed, with no visible labeling or icons.
